posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing monday Sales CRM bi-weekly deep dive sessions

After seeing all the great questions our community had about monday sales CRM, we are excited to be launching bi-weekly CRM deep dive sessions led by Sasha and Dana

How will these sessions work?

Each session spotlights a different aspect—a feature, use case, or industry-specific insight—of monday Sales CRM, directly influenced by your questions and the valuable feedback you provide.

Got a topic in mind?

These sessions are all about YOUR interests and needs. Want to dive deep into a particular feature? Curious how CRM can be optimized for your industry? Drop us a comment right here with your suggestions, and your request could lead to our next session!

Make sure to check back weekly and sign up for the events that spark your interests!

Register for an upcoming session here.

Questions? Thoughts? Suggestions? ↓↓↓↓

CRM BIweekly forum 11601×906 194 KB
